  1. org.springframework.ai.model
  2. ModelOptions

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.ai.model.ModelOptions

Packages that use ModelOptions
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.audio.transcription
 
org.springframework.ai.audio.tts
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.cohere
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.titan
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.elevenlabs
 
org.springframework.ai.embedding
Provides the API for embedding observations.
org.springframework.ai.google.genai
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.text
 
org.springframework.ai.image
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.moderation
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr
 
org.springframework.ai.model
Provides a set of interfaces and classes for a generic API designed to interact with various AI models.
org.springframework.ai.model.tool
 
org.springframework.ai.moderation
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api
 
org.springframework.ai.openai
 
org.springframework.ai.postgresml
 
org.springframework.ai.stabilityai.api

    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    StructuredOutputChatOptions
    Mixin interface for ChatModels that support structured output.

    ToolCallingChatOptions
